creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-04-11 22:35:42 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/p5-XML-DoubleEncodedEntities Makefile distinfo 
                                          pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This module is a tiny shim to unbreak XML files that have had their
  entities doubly-encoded.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/XML-DoubleEncodedEntities/
  
  PR:             ports/133600
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1325    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/textproc/p5-XML-DoubleEncodedEntities/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/textproc/p5-XML-DoubleEncodedEntities/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/textproc/p5-XML-DoubleEncodedEntities/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/textproc/p5-XML-DoubleEncodedEntities/pkg-plist (new)
